name: Curried Chicken Spring Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften cellophane noodles and cut into 2-inch lengths.
2. Dissolve cornstarch in 1 Tbsp water.
3. Cut chilies into halves.
4. Marinate chicken for 1 or 2 days in a bag with 1 Tbsp soy sauce, coconut milk, white vinegar, and 3/4 tsp curry powder.
5. Heat 1 to 2 Tbsp oil in a wok and stir fry chicken until mostly white. Remove and set aside, then clean the wok.
6. Combine salt, sugar, remaining soy sauce, and cider vinegar. Place in the wok with the chicken. Heat through, add cornstarch, and cook 2 to 3 minutes until glossy. Spread on a large plate and cool in the refrigerator.
7. Combine ginger, garlic, remaining curry powder, and chilies. Heat 3 Tbsp oil and cook chili mixture for 1 to 2 minutes. It should foam without browning.
8. Add celery, then cabbage. When translucent, add carrots and noodles.
9. Combine chicken and noodle mixtures. Use 2 Tbsp filling per spring wrapper.
10. Tuck in ends and include a sprig of cilantro in the last turn (to show through when fried). Seal with egg yolk.
11. Deep fry about 3 minutes at 350 degrees and drain.
12. To make dipping sauce, blend chilies and garlic until pureed. Add ginger juice and oil until blended. Season with salt. Add cilantro just before serving. Makes one cup.
